Ntc Of Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-09-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Zachary Alexander Toran, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff, Newlogic Business Loans, Inc.
Declaration of Stuart A. Katz and Vincent Aubrey on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Drewes Bros. Meats, a general partnership; Celilia S. De Leon; Joshua Epple; Isaac Epple.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $98,062.82
Pre-Judgment Interest at the rate of 10%: $10,156.86
Attorney's Fees: $2,242.50
Costs: $547.50
Total Judgment in the amount of $111,009.68
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-18-2013 Continued To Sep-04-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
